titel: Remarks by Commissioner Hoekstra at the Council meeting on environmental issues (ENVI).
html:
European Commission speech in Luxembourg, June 25, 2026.

Good evening, ladies and gentlemen. I want to thank you for your commitment – I have expressed my gratitude on several occasions before. Thank you very much for being here. This morning, just outside the door...
tldr: A representative from the European Commission thanked the politicians for their work and their presence at the meeting on environmental issues.
lattlast:
Commissioner Hoekstra from the European Commission is addressing politicians working on environmental issues. She thanks them for their commitment to their work.

She expresses her gratitude that they have attended the meeting in Luxembourg on June 25, 2026. The text ends just as she is about to begin describing something that happened that morning.
